title: Dockerfile: remove inline comments
body:
Newer docker version (> 1.12.x) now perform a pre-build syntax check. Inline comments are no longer allowed.

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca <runcom@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM.  It would be nice to preserve at least the comment about the version conflict, but do feel free to merge as is.
